Quality Education.reason: Focus on 'educational technology' and 'pedagogical practices' supports multiple targets, especially Target 4.7.
The course is fundamentally about improving education through 'educational technology' and 'pedagogical practices', directly supporting quality teaching and learning (Targets 4.4, 4.c).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course promotes 'technological upgrading' and innovation within the education sector, enhancing professional skills for decent work for future educators (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Focuses on 'innovation' and upgrading 'technological capabilities' in education by using 'Generative AI' and ICT, aligning with Targets 9.5 and 9.c.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Technology in education can be inferred to support Target 10.2 by creating more inclusive learning opportunities, though this is not an explicit course focus.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances 'capacity-building' (Target 17.9) and 'knowledge sharing' (Target 17.6) by promoting the use of 'enabling technology' like AI in education.
